title: Mutual funds, crypto, artwork: Inside Abhishek Manu Singhvi's ₹2,500+ crore net worth declared in RS poll affidavit
description: Congress leader Abhishek Manu Singhvi has declared a staggering net worth of over ₹2,500 crores in his poll affidavit, revealing diverse assets including mutual funds, crypto investments, and valuable artwork. This declaration comes as he seeks re-nomination for the Rajya Sabha from Telangana.
